/usr/bin/ar qc libmakesdr-config-json.a "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/audio/AudioConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/audio/AudioIqSourceConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/audio/AudioSignalIqSourceConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/audio/IqIoConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/base/ConfigBase.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/BandSelectorBandsConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/DigitalInputConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/DigitalOutputsConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/QtControlSinkConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/ControlConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/DigitalOutputConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/GpioLinesConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/GpioInputLinesConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/RotaryEncoderConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/BandSelectorConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/DigitalInputsConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/FunCubeConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/control/QtControlSourceConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/radio/RadioConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/radio/ReceiverConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/radio/TransmitterConfig.json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-config-json.dir/src/ui/UiConfig.json.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libmakesdr-config-json.a
